app.name: atproto.dart
app.one_liner: A comprehensive Dart/Flutter SDK for building decentralized social applications on the AT Protocol and Bluesky ecosystem.

screens.name: AT Protocol Integration Dashboard
screens.purpose: Enable developers to configure, authenticate, and interact with AT Protocol services including Bluesky APIs.

rust_commands.name: authenticate_session
rust_commands.purpose: Establish a secure user session using built-in OAuth DPoP authentication.

rust_commands.name: fetch_bluesky_feed
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve user or algorithmic feeds from Bluesky using the AT Protocol client libraries.

mvp_plan: week 1: Display user feed from Bluesky API
week 1: Implement OAuth DPoP authentication flow
week 1: Set up Flutter project with atproto.dart core and client libraries
acceptance_tests: The app retrieves and displays a user’s Bluesky feed with posts, authors, and content.
The app successfully authenticates a user session using OAuth DPoP against the AT Protocol.
